title: phlegmariurus pecten
intro: Phlegmariurus pecten, also known as the forked forked polypody or forked polypody, is a species of plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae, a type of fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Phlegmariurus pecten include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its therapeutic potential.
